rows.title: Voltage-aware tapered proxy search beyond the 4.15C incumbent
rows.setup_note: Used the accepted lumo PyBaMM environment and kept the four canonical metrics unchanged while extending the protocol family with a tail-rate dimension.
rows.result_summary: VTBO pushed the frontier beyond the 4.15C incumbent and improved nominal Q30 by +5.62% over BO_3step_aggressive while keeping full guard feasibility.
rows.impact_summary: This established the last strong fixed-family improvement before EVTBO and PSMS-v2.

rows.title: UA_EVTBO v1 bounded robust search on followup_v1
rows.setup_note: Kept the accepted four-metric contract and used EVTBO as the immediate pre-PSMS frontier anchor under the same followup_v1 robust bundle.
rows.result_summary: EVTBO improved nominal Q30 over VTBO while preserving success_rate=1.0 and guard_pass_rate=1.0, becoming the last previous SOTA line before PSMS-v2.
rows.impact_summary: This defines the direct predecessor that PSMS-v2 must beat to justify a new method story.

rows.title: PSMS-v2 larger-budget robust search beyond the EVTBO anchor
rows.setup_note: Reused the accepted PyBaMM fast-charge contract and the followup_v1 robust bundle, but searched a richer PSMS-v2 staged family with entry/monitor/hold roles and feasibility-aware ordering under the same robust ranking rule.
rows.result_summary: PSMS-v2 promoted UA5_PSMS_3.00C_rest10m_4.30C_e4.50_v4p18_h3.35_1p5m as the robust top protocol. Nominal Q30 improved by +7.19% over BO_3step_aggressive and by +1.20% over EVTBO, while plating_loss stayed flat and both sei_growth and total_lli improved.
rows.impact_summary: This is the headline evidence that the full PSMS package improves the frontier while preserving full feasibility; the later ablations bound that claim at the package level rather than a single-component mechanism.
